result.reason: User requests the ability to hide specific text elements within the MultiSSH toolbar, likely the 'MultiSSH' label, for a cleaner user interface.
result.approach: Add a new boolean setting in mRemoteNG.Properties.Settings to control the visibility of the 'MultiSSH' label. Modify MultiSshToolStrip.cs to bind the 'lblMultiSsh.Visible' property to this new setting, allowing users to hide the label via options.
